title: Felix and the Great Family Camping Mix-Up
synopsis: When Felix's family goes camping, everything goes hilariously wrong - from a mixed-up tent to a runaway breakfast. But Felix discovers that the best adventures happen when you work together as a family.

pages.text: Felix bounced on his bed. "We're going camping!" he shouted. His mom smiled from the doorway. "That's right! But first we need to pack." Felix looked at his messy room. Where should he start?

illustration.description: A cheerful 6-year-old boy with curly brown hair and bright green eyes bouncing on a blue bed in a colorful, messy bedroom. His mom, a warm Black woman with natural hair in a yellow sweater, stands in the doorway smiling. Toys and clothes scattered everywhere in rich, playful colors.
illustration.alt: Felix bouncing excitedly on his bed while his mom watches from the doorway

pages.text: "I need my superhero cape!" Felix said. "And my toy dinosaur!" Mom laughed. "Those are great. But do you need warm clothes?" Felix grabbed his winter coat. It was July. "Maybe something lighter?" Mom suggested.

illustration.description: Felix holding up a bright red superhero cape and a green toy dinosaur while wearing a puffy winter coat. His expression is excited but confused. His mom gestures toward lighter summer clothes hanging nearby. Warm sunlight streams through the window showing it's clearly summer outside.
illustration.alt: Felix holding camping items while wearing the wrong clothes for summer

pages.text: Dad poked his head in. He had glasses and a big smile. "Ready for our adventure?" Felix nodded. "I packed everything!" Dad looked at Felix's bag. It was full of toys and snacks. "Did you pack pajamas?" Dad asked. Felix's eyes went wide. Oops!

illustration.description: Felix's dad, a tall Asian man with kind eyes behind round glasses and a plaid shirt, looking at an overstuffed backpack spilling with colorful toys, comic books, and candy. Felix looks surprised with wide eyes and his mouth forming an 'O' shape. The forgotten pajamas are visible on a shelf in the background.
illustration.alt: Dad looking at Felix's overpacked bag full of toys instead of clothes

pages.text: The campsite was beautiful! There were tall trees and a sparkly lake. "This is perfect!" said Mom. Felix's little sister Rosa pointed at the water. "Fish!" she said. She was three and loved everything.

illustration.description: A gorgeous campsite with towering green trees and a crystal-blue lake reflecting the sky. Felix's family stands together - Felix with his curly hair, his Black mother, Asian father with glasses, and little Rosa, a mixed-race toddler with pigtails pointing excitedly at fish jumping in the water. Golden afternoon sunlight filters through the trees.
illustration.alt: The family arriving at a beautiful lakeside campsite

pages.text: "Let's set up our tent!" Dad said. He pulled out a big box. The tent was orange and looked easy. "I'll help!" Felix said. But the tent had many pieces. "Where does this go?" Felix asked, holding a long pole.

illustration.description: Dad and Felix surrounded by tent pieces scattered on the grassy ground. Felix holds a tent pole high above his head looking puzzled, while dad studies instruction papers with a confused expression. The bright orange tent fabric is tangled nearby. Other happy campers can be seen successfully setting up in the background.
illustration.alt: Felix and his dad looking confused while trying to set up their tent

pages.text: Two hours later, their tent looked very silly. It was lopsided and wobbly. "It looks like a flat pancake!" Rosa giggled. Mom tried not to laugh. "Maybe we should ask for help?" she said. A friendly family from the next campsite came over.

illustration.description: A hilariously lopsided orange tent that's completely flat on one side and bulging on the other. Felix's family stands looking at it with amused expressions. A diverse neighboring family - including a Latina mother and her twin boys - approaches with friendly smiles, clearly ready to help.
illustration.alt: The family's poorly assembled tent looking like a flat pancake

pages.text: The next morning, Felix woke up hungry. "Can we make pancakes?" he asked. Dad started the camp stove. Mom mixed the batter. Felix watched the pan. "This is going to be great!" he said.

illustration.description: Early morning at the campsite with golden sunlight. Felix sits up in his sleeping bag inside the now-properly-assembled tent, his hair messy from sleep but eyes bright with excitement. Through the tent opening, his parents can be seen at a picnic table with camping cooking supplies and a bowl of pancake batter.
illustration.alt: Felix waking up hungry in the tent while his parents prepare breakfast

pages.text: Dad flipped the first pancake. It flew high in the air! "Catch it!" Mom laughed. Felix jumped up. The pancake landed on his head instead of the plate. "I caught it!" Felix giggled. Rosa clapped her hands.

illustration.description: A golden-brown pancake sitting perfectly on top of Felix's curly hair like a hat, with Felix grinning widely and his arms spread in triumph. Dad holds the spatula looking surprised, while Mom and Rosa laugh joyfully in the background. The scene is filled with warm morning light and captures the silly, fun moment.
illustration.alt: Felix with a pancake on his head after trying to catch it

pages.text: A squirrel smelled the pancakes. It ran right onto their table! "Shoo!" said Dad. But the squirrel grabbed a pancake and ran up a tree. "That's our breakfast!" Felix called up. The squirrel chattered back. It seemed to say "Thank you!"

illustration.description: A cheeky gray squirrel with bright black eyes sitting in a tall pine tree, holding a golden pancake in its tiny paws and looking very pleased with itself. Below, Felix points up at the squirrel with an expression of amused disbelief, while his family watches the breakfast thief with laughter. Pine needles and dappled sunlight frame the scene.
illustration.alt: A squirrel in a tree holding their stolen pancake while Felix points up at it

pages.text: After breakfast, Felix wanted to explore. "Stay close!" Mom said. Felix saw a pretty butterfly. It was yellow and orange. He followed it down a path. The butterfly was so beautiful! Felix kept walking and walking.

illustration.description: Felix walking along a winding forest path, his eyes fixed on a magnificent monarch butterfly with bright orange and black wings fluttering just ahead of him. Tall trees create dappled shadows on the path, and wildflowers dot the forest floor. Felix's expression shows wonder and curiosity as he follows the butterfly deeper into the woods.
illustration.alt: Felix following a colorful butterfly down a forest path

pages.text: Suddenly, Felix stopped. Where was his family? The butterfly was gone too. Felix looked around. All the trees looked the same! "Mom? Dad?" he called. His voice echoed in the quiet forest. Felix felt scared.

illustration.description: Felix standing alone in a clearing surrounded by tall, similar-looking trees, his hands cupped around his mouth as he calls out. His expression shows worry and uncertainty. The forest feels bigger and more mysterious now, with deeper shadows and no clear path visible. Sunbeams filter through the canopy creating an atmospheric but slightly intimidating scene.
illustration.alt: Felix looking worried and calling for his family in the forest

pages.text: Felix remembered what Mom taught him. "If you get lost, stay put and call for help." He found a big rock and sat down. "HELP!" he yelled as loud as he could. "I'M HERE!" Soon he heard voices. "Felix!" It was Dad! His family came running through the trees.

illustration.description: Felix sitting on a large gray boulder with his hands cupped around his mouth, yelling for help. His parents and little Rosa emerge from between the trees in the background, with relieved and happy expressions on their faces as they spot him. Dad is pointing toward Felix while Mom holds Rosa's hand, all of them hurrying forward with joy and relief.
illustration.alt: Felix calling for help while his family comes running to find him

pages.text: "We were so worried!" Mom said, hugging Felix tight. "I followed a butterfly," Felix explained. "But I remembered to stay put and call for help." Dad smiled proudly. "You did exactly the right thing." Rosa hugged Felix too.

illustration.description: A warm family group hug in the forest clearing, with Mom wrapping her arms around Felix while Dad puts his hand on Felix's shoulder and Rosa hugs his legs. All their faces show relief, love, and pride. The afternoon sunlight creates a golden glow around the family, emphasizing the emotional reunion and the strong family bond.
illustration.alt: The whole family hugging Felix after finding him safe

pages.text: That night, they sat around a campfire. Dad told funny stories. Mom made s'mores. Felix looked at his family. "This is the best adventure ever," he said. "Even when things go wrong?" Mom asked. "Especially then!" Felix grinned.

illustration.description: The family gathered around a crackling orange campfire under a starry twilight sky. Felix sits between his parents roasting marshmallows on sticks, while Rosa sits on Mom's lap. Their faces are lit by the warm firelight, all wearing content, happy expressions. The tent glows softly in the background, and fireflies dance around them in the deepening dusk.
illustration.alt: The family sitting around a cozy campfire under the stars

pages.text: Felix learned something important that weekend. Adventures are more fun with family. Even flat-pancake tents and squirrel thieves couldn't ruin their trip. "Can we go camping again?" Felix asked. "Absolutely!" said Mom and Dad together. Rosa clapped and said, "Fish!"

illustration.description: A wide view of the beautiful campsite at dawn, with the family's orange tent properly set up, the sparkling lake in the background, and the family packing up their camping gear together. Felix helps Dad fold sleeping bags while Mom and Rosa put items in the car. Everyone looks happy and content, with the squirrel from earlier watching from a nearby tree branch.
illustration.alt: The family happily packing up their successful camping trip

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did Felix pack first for the camping trip?
choices: His superhero cape and toy dinosaur
questions.explanation: Felix got excited and packed his superhero cape and toy dinosaur first, forgetting about practical items like pajamas!

questions.question: What did their tent look like when they first set it up?
questions.explanation: Rosa giggled that their lopsided tent looked like a flat pancake! They needed help from their neighbors to fix it.

questions.question: Who stole their pancake?
questions.explanation: A cheeky squirrel ran onto their table, grabbed a pancake, and ran up a tree with their breakfast!

questions.question: What did Felix follow into the forest?
questions.explanation: Felix followed a beautiful yellow and orange butterfly down the path and got lost when he wandered too far from his family.

questions.question: What did Felix do when he realized he was lost?
choices: Kept walking to find his family
Sat on a rock and called for help
questions.explanation: Felix remembered his mom's advice to stay put and call for help when lost. He sat on a big rock and yelled until his family found him!

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words - Chapter 1
pages.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence from the story!

sentences.text: Felix bounced on his _____ when he heard about camping.
Felix packed his superhero _____ and toy dinosaur first.
Dad asked if Felix had packed his _____.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words - Chapter 3
pages.instructions: Complete these sentences about the breakfast adventure!

sentences.text: The _____ flew high in the air when Dad flipped it.
A _____ ran onto their table and stole their breakfast.
The pancake landed on Felix's _____ instead of the plate.
